case_title: CHINA BASIN PROPERTIES LTD. VS STELLARNET, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHINA BASIN PROPERTIES LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT STELLARNET, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
